testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_escrow_patch_features.py:25: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_invalid_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/400, got 429 assert 429 in [401, 400] + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_escrow_patch_features.py:39: in test_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code in [401, 400], f"Expected 401/400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/400, got 429 E assert 429 in [401, 400] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
